name: hri-skills
description: Depth pack for ACM/IEEE HRI: five-track full-paper submission, two-phase double-blind review with rebuttal, PCS portal, 8-page acmart budget, human-subjects study design, the video figure, ACM+IEEE dual publication, and the alt.HRI / LBR / video / Student Design tracks.

plugins.name: hri-skills
plugins.description: Twelve HRI-specific skills for the ACM/IEEE International Conference on Human-Robot Interaction and its interdisciplinary, human-subjects-centered evidence culture, grounded in the HRI 2026/2027 calls, humanrobotinteraction.org, the ACM Digital Library, IEEE Xplore, and dblp.
